description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Singularity Integration that runs on push to the master branch and on pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job running in a Singularity v3.9.0 container with privileged mode, checking out the repository, then add root to subuid and subgid, set the correct branch in the Singularity file, build a Singularity image, and finally source Biodynamo and run a demo.
